prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Overweight
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Sertraline (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 66.3 kg; Height 166.5 cm; BMI 23.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.2%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 8.8%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 8.3%), FPG (12 months ago 232mg/dL; 9 months ago 220mg/dL; 6 months ago 210mg/dL; 3 months ago 202mg/dL; current 196mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 65.9kg; 9 months ago 67.8kg; 6 months ago 66.8kg; 3 months ago 66.7kg; current 66.3kg), Height (12 months ago 166.5cm; 9 months ago 166.5cm; 6 months ago 166.5cm; 3 months ago 166.5cm; current 166.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 23.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 33U/L; 9 months ago 35U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 29U/L), AST (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 10U/L; 6 months ago 15U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 13U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; current 36mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 88mg/g; 9 months ago 95mg/g; 6 months ago 104mg/g; 3 months ago 114mg/g; current 124mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 98mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 101mg/dL; 3 months ago 97mg/dL; current 99mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 167mg/dL; 9 months ago 167mg/dL; 6 months ago 185mg/dL; 3 months ago 163mg/dL; current 175mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.2g/dL; 3 months ago 13.9g/dL; current 13.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
